vectors.name: announce_rendezvous_channel
vectors.description: Announce includes rx_channel=3; receiver schedules next unicast on announced channel per CCP-9 da2q rendezvous. Independent oracle.

vectors.name: initial_unknown_peer_control_ch0
vectors.description: Initial contact with unknown peer uses CH0 control channel rendezvous. Announce then enables data channel follow-up per da2q CCP-9.

vectors.name: known_peer_synchronized_hop_preference
vectors.description: For known peers, synchronized_hop_channel(eui=..., t=1000) =5 overrides pure announce rendezvous (CCP-12 normative over CCP-9).

vectors.name: announce_channel_parse_roundtrip
vectors.description: Announce packet with channel field encodes/decodes consistently. Tests L2 payload dispatch for rendezvous metadata. Independent oracle bytes from spec L2 dispatch + wire format (no code-under-test as oracle).
